name: Snow Critters
description: Notes Part of the Frost Wander Archer Set.

stats.damage: 300–350 (average: 325 / total: 900-1050 (975)) With Magical Winter Scarf equipped: 350-525 (average: 437.5 / total: 1050-1575 (1312.5))

effects: Gun Critter: This critter rapidly fires towards enemies. Flail Snowflake: Creates 4 spinning flails around the spawn point. Heavy Critter: This critter fires 3 larger, heavier bullets in a cone.
Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstaclesWith Frostbite Mittens equipped: Every 3rd shot inflicts Slowed for 0.2s
Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
With Blizzard Jacket equipped: Inflicts Slowed for 0.2s
Shots pass through obstaclesWith Magical Winter Scarf equipped: Every other shot inflicts Slowed for 0.2 seconds
